title: myrtus orbiculata
intro: Myrtus orbiculata, also known as the round-leaved myrtle, is a species of flowering plant in the myrtle family, native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe and calm irritated skin and tissues. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Myrtus orbiculata include teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
